action.reasoning: Observation: Current best EER 0.0787 (acc@EER=0.9213) with WavLM-large+stats-pool+MLP(dropout=0.5), aug, wd=5e-3, cosine over 15 epochs; dev EER reaches ~0.0003 (severe overfitting to seen A01-A06). Last iter took ~2.9h, now 1.02h left. Analysis: Masked stats pooling fixes padding bias in mean/std; stronger aug (gain -10..10dB, SNR 5-20dB p=0.8) targets codec robustness for OOD test; 2x batch sizes (train=16/dev=64) halves time (~0.5h for 6 epochs). Root cause of limited gain is insufficient distortion modeling. Decision: Update model.py (add masked pooling), fully rewrite train.py (stronger aug, bs/hypers, complete loops+metrics.jsonl logging per spec+best-save), bump predict bs=128; train 6 epochs then submit_eval for improved EER within time.
